title: A multifunctional shower head
abstract: The present invention discloses a multi-functional shower head, comprising a hollow handle (3); a circular housing (16) attached to one end of the handle (3), said housing having an water inlet and a screw receiving spigot; a valve (7) attached to the water inlet; a circular divider (8) fitting well with the housing mounted on the spigot (16) and having a plurality of apertures (18, 19, 20) formed along perimeter side of the divider; a turntable front cover (11) mounted to the divider (8), said turntable front cover having a plurality of pattern apertures and a plurality of concentric walls on the other side.
claims:
Claims 1) A multi-functional shower head, comprising: a hollow handle (3); a circular housing (19) attached to one end of the handle (3), said housing (20) having an water inlet and a screw receiving spigot (6); a valve (7) attached to the water inlet for controlling water flows from the water inlet of the housing (20); a circular divider (8) fitting well with the housing mounted on the spigot (6) and having a plurality of apertures (16, 17, 18) formed along perimeter side of the divider where by rotating the divider on the spigot (6) as a centre will divert water to flow at least one of its apertures, said each of the aperture having a different water spray mode; a turntable front cover (11) mounted to the divider (8) , said turntable front cover (11) having a plurality of pattern apertures and a plurality of concentric walls on the other side; wherein the concentric walls separate the pattern apertures of the turntable front cover (11) into a plurality of chambers for diverting the water flows from the housing through any apertures (16, 17, 18) of the divider, then to the selective pattern apertures for at least one spray mode. 2) A multi-functional shower head according to claim 1 , further comprising a plurality of spray nozzles (9) inserted in the pattern apertures for directing the water into tiny droplets in misty spray mode. 3) A multi-functional shower head according to claim 1 or 2, further comprising a flywheel (10) is held in between the divider (8) and the cover (11) to create a pulsating flow for massage spray mode. 

 4) A multi-functional shower head according to claim 1, 2 or 3, wherein the concentric walls separate the pattern aperture into three chambers: inner, middle and outer chambers. 5) A multi-functional shower head according to claim 1, 2, 3 or 4, wherein the inner chamber of apertures in responsible is to the massage spray mode. 6) A multi-functional shower head according to claim 1, 2, 3, 4 or 5, wherein the middle chamber of apertures is in responsible to the misty spray mode. 7) A multi-functional shower head according to claim 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 or 6 wherein the outer chamber of apertures is in responsible to normal spray mode. 8) A multi-functional shower head according to claim 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 or 7 further comprising a snap on thread adaptor (1) connected to another end of the handle (3) which in turn connected to a water supply. 9) A multi-functional shower head according to claim 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 or 8 the shower head is adapted to be incorporating into a wall-mount shower head.
